title: Vacancy for Teacher at VIT University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at VIT University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VIT University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About VIT University:
VIT University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University!
